category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Armenia EAEU / EAC (Customs Union Technical Regulations) requirements.

title.en: China-to-Armenia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入亚美尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入亞美尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Armenia's EAEU / Customs Union Technical Regulations (TR CU 004/2011 LVD, TR CU 020/2011 EMC, EAC conformity mark), GOST IEC 60335-2-24 safety, and the EAEU energy-efficiency label requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与亚美尼亚EAEU/关税同盟技术法规（TR CU 004/2011低压、TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容、EAC合格标志）、GOST IEC 60335-2-24安全标准及EAEU能效标签要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與亞美尼亞EAEU/關稅同盟技術法規（TR CU 004/2011低壓、TR CU 020/2011電磁相容、EAC合格標誌）、GOST IEC 60335-2-24安全標準及EAEU能效標籤要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EAEU Technical Regulations, applicable GOST / interstate standards, energy-efficiency provisions, and EAC certification or declaration requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行EAEU技术法规、适用的GOST/国家间标准、能效条款及EAC认证或声明要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行EAEU技術法規、適用的GOST/國家間標準、能效條款及EAC認證或聲明要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers exporting to Armenia face four main EAEU compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to TR CU 004/2011 (Low Voltage) tested against GOST IEC 60335-2-24 — CCC / GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) EMC conformity to TR CU 020/2011 — Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data cannot substitute; (3) EAC conformity marking via an accredited EAEU body (certification or declaration of conformity), which requires an in-country importer or applicant established in the EAEU; and (4) the EAEU energy-efficiency label, whose grade and methodology differ from China's GB 12021.2 China Energy Label. Armenia's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — a genuine match to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal — and R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned, but charge documentation and the EAC route still require verification.
answer_first.zh: 出口亚美尼亚的中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四项主要EAEU合规差距：（1）依据TR CU 004/2011（低压）按GOST IEC 60335-2-24进行电气安全合格评定——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）依据TR CU 020/2011进行电磁兼容合格评定——中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据不能替代；（3）通过EAEU认可机构进行EAC合格标志评定（认证或合格声明），须有在EAEU境内设立的进口商或申请人；（4）EAEU能效标签，其等级和方法与中国GB 12021.2中国能效标识不同。亚美尼亚电网为220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国220/380 V 50 Hz标称值真正匹配——R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但充注量文件和EAC路径仍须核实。
answer_first.zht: 出口亞美尼亞的中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四項主要EAEU合規差距：（1）依據TR CU 004/2011（低壓）按GOST IEC 60335-2-24進行電氣安全合格評定——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）依據TR CU 020/2011進行電磁相容合格評定——中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據不能替代；（3）通過EAEU認可機構進行EAC合格標誌評定（認證或合格聲明），須有在EAEU境內設立的進口商或申請人；（4）EAEU能效標籤，其等級和方法與中國GB 12021.2中國能效標識不同。亞美尼亞電網為220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國220/380 V 50 Hz標稱值真正匹配——R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但充注量文件和EAC路徑仍須核實。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, EAEU Commission, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
